summary: Added a source-backed Devpilot production config pack and linked the demo runbook to it so production handoff does not copy demo exports directly.
remaining_risks: The pack is source-backed documentation; environment-specific production secret values and service-manager wiring remain external deployment inputs.
Command policy content is intentionally deferred to S013.
Agent production service unit/run mode is intentionally deferred to S014.
next: S013 can start: harden command policy safety templates for demo-safe and production-safe live execution.
